# Versioning Policy

<details>
<summary>How to use this template</summary>

- Define semantic versioning rules, release cadence, and tagging strategy.
- Include guidance for pre-release labels and hotfix handling.
- Align with compatibility and support policies.
- Remove this block once filled.

</details>

## Scope

- Components covered (services, SDKs, docs).
- Exclusions or special cases.

## Version Scheme

- **Format:** e.g., `MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH`
- **Increment Rules:**
  - MAJOR when ...
  - MINOR when ...
  - PATCH when ...
- **Pre-release Tags:** alpha/beta/rc usage.

## Release Cadence

- Planned release windows.
- Approval requirements.
- Communication channels.

## Tagging & Branching

- Git tag format and annotated tag requirements.
- Release branch naming.
- Support branch strategy.

## Deprecation Policy

- Advance notice requirements.
- Sunset timelines.
- Customer communication templates.

## Compliance & Audit

- Evidence stored in release checklists.
- Regulatory references.

## Change Log Process

- Location of release notes.
- Required metadata (date, version, summary, links).

## Review History

| Date | Reviewer | Outcome |
| ---- | -------- | ------- |
| YYYY-MM-DD | name | Approved |
